microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **data-intensive validation platform** from a 2-person operation into a self-service system, standardizing data flows and workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 product development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining data architecture requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and eliminated manual coordination across eng and GTM teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable, data-driven model for continuous platform validation.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, partnering daily with engineering and data teams to ensure system reliability and data integrity; served as bridge lead on a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ contract.

Built an internal **AI agent** using LLM-powered workflows to automate drill planning and reduce planning cycle time by 39%, increasing drill execution capacity by 21% without adding headcount — treating automation as a core platform feature.

Owned integration execution with external enterprise partners (Databricks, SAP, NetApp), defining API contracts and data attribution logic to ensure reliable, scalable data flows between Vendelux-equivalent internal systems and third-party platforms.

Authored clear technical specs and system documentation for cross-functional stakeholders, translating complex backend data pipeline tradeoffs into prioritized roadmap decisions aligned to platform reliability and **GTM team efficiency** goals.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI product adoption** for LLM-powered code generation workflows, running user demos and training sessions that onboarded 14 Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** — validating AI as a core productivity feature in the platform.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with Azure engineering teams, surfacing critical data and workflow gaps that informed prioritization decisions under high ambiguity.

Improved **data integrity and retrieval** by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search system, reducing lookup time by 83% and demonstrating how clean data architecture directly improves user outcomes.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework — coordinating data flow decisions and execution sequencing across 140+ engineering and GTM teams.

Defined a product strategy to reduce operational toil in region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual work per region**, then built an ETL-informed roadmap to automate critical data and deployment paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track and attribute operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership a reliable data layer to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and measure reduction in manual GTM workflows over time.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping system dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and ensuring data integrity throughout each phase of the platform cutover.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, maintaining a prioritized backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process — keeping engineering execution tightly aligned to reliability and delivery commitments.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, reducing manual deployment steps and accelerating the software release cycle by 25% — directly reducing internal workflow toil across the GTM and ops teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end CRM workflow for 200+ monthly proposals — standardizing data entry, scoping, and invoicing processes to reduce manual work and improve pipeline attribution accuracy across the GTM team.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital presence and aligning messaging to target customer segments identified through analytics.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting financial analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and building a data model to inform profitability attribution — mirroring core data and attribution logic work central to this role.
